headline: Is Cardinal (CAH) a Solid Growth Stock? 3 Reasons to Think "Yes"
summary: Cardinal (CAH) is well positioned to outperform the market, as it exhibits above-average growth in financials.

headline: Cardinal (CAH) May Find a Bottom Soon, Here's Why You Should Buy the Stock Now
summary: Cardinal (CAH) witnesses a hammer chart pattern, indicating support found by the stock after losing some value lately. This coupled with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
